objective: Evaluate one final representation-independent structured action witness using pure fixtures first and then exactly one fresh candidate/baseline provider pair.

inherited_immutable_authority.interpretation_guard: Phase 1 and Replacement Phase 2 contracts, manifests, results, revisions, and decisions remain immutable and are not re-scored, republished, relabeled, or reinterpreted. In particular, the Phase 2 marker is not promoted after the fact.

phase_position.name: Final Remediation Phase 3 structured action witness
phase_position.on_non_adopt: Do not create another isolation hypothesis, retry, replacement, or remediation; hand the bounded REJECT/INCONCLUSIVE program to closeout selection.

hypothesis.claim: After reading the byte-derived candidate Skill, Codex emits a separate completed exit-0 command event whose output bytes are exactly the marker plus LF, while a no-Skill baseline remains source/action/marker/ambient-read free.

fixed_controls.inner_sandbox: disabled via --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox inside outer container only
fixed_controls.prompt: Review PROBE.md and draft a concise, human-reviewable completion contract. Stop before activation, do not edit files, and keep the final response under 120 words.

outer_isolation_boundary.workspace_transfer: Copy a synthetic workspace from the verified per-run temp root into a stopped container with docker cp; use no mount or bind.
outer_isolation_boundary.auth_transfer: Use one verified per-cell temporary auth copy, copy it with docker cp, never display or publish its bytes/hash, and remove only the verified temp path after the cell.
preflight_before_provider: zero Docker Mounts, HostConfig.Binds, HostConfig.Mounts, and Config.Volumes
fixed image ID and linux/amd64 platform
bridge network and no published ports
Privileged false, CapDrop ALL, no-new-privileges true
fixed 2 CPU, 2 GiB memory, and 256 PID limits
no Docker socket, host profile, host checkout, repository, or arbitrary host directory exposure

candidate_test_copy.exact_append_utf8:
## Test-only structured action witness

If and only if this Skill is invoked for the current request, run exactly one harmless, filesystem-nonchanging command action whose stdout is exactly PHASE3_STRUCTURED_ACTION_WITNESS_91C6E2AF followed by one LF byte. Do not mention the action or marker in the final response.
candidate_test_copy.delta_classification: One test-only marker action instruction; production candidate bytes remain unchanged.

detector.input: Ordered parsed JSONL events, final agent message, exact base and derived Skill bytes, logical derived Skill target, condition inventory, and fixed marker bytes.

source_read.target: Normalize only path separators and require the derived SKILL.md path token; do not compare the command wrapper or quoting.
source_read.output: Aggregated output must contain the full exact derived SKILL.md UTF-8 bytes whose frozen SHA-256 is candidate_test_copy.derived_skill_file_sha256.

action.output_field: Use stdout when present, otherwise aggregated_output; if both are present they must be byte-identical.

detector.ordering: A qualifying source-read completed-event ordinal is lower than the qualifying action completed-event ordinal, and opaque item IDs are present and unequal.
detector.baseline_absence: Inventory empty; zero qualifying source reads; zero qualifying actions; marker absent from final output; zero ambient Skill reads. An ambient read is a completed exit-0 command event with a normalized SKILL.md path token and output containing the exact committed base Skill bytes.
sanitized_public_evidence: exact output byte length and SHA-256

required_pure_fixtures: PASS: action shell wrapper differs but separate post-source completed exit-0 action output is exact marker plus LF
FAIL: marker exists only in source-read output
FAIL: marker exists only in final prose
FAIL: action output has additional bytes
FAIL: baseline contains marker, qualifying action, or ambient read

condition_delta.candidate: Add only the byte-derived Phase 3 candidate test-copy directory.
condition_delta.all_other_inputs: Byte-identical prompt, fixture, Codex version, model, effort, runtime image, network, auth bytes, runtime controls, and fixed candidate-then-baseline order.

adopt: candidate source-read then separate qualifying action PASS
fresh post-contract and post-detector-test pair PASS
manifest, sanitized result, sidecar hash, and tracked public-safety validation PASS
decision_gate.adopt_meaning: Adopt only the isolation witness method; do not infer Skill quality superiority or paired-comparison success.
decision_gate.reject: Both cells are normal but at least one gate is false.
decision_gate.inconclusive: Container, auth, provider, or structured-event infrastructure prevents a normal paired observation.
decision_gate.stop: Publish exactly one decision and perform no retry, reorder, replacement, detector change, additional isolation hypothesis, or paired smoke in this phase.

next_phase.name: valid paired smoke
next_phase.non_adopt_closeout: Record that further isolation remediation is prohibited and list bounded REJECT/INCONCLUSIVE closeout as the next decision.

prohibited: persistent user/global Skill or config changes
modification, deletion, rescoring, republication, relabeling, or reinterpretation of R-002 through R-013 or Phase 1/2 authority
